title: nextflow-best-practices samplesheet schema
description: Schema for the samplesheet provided via params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: Read 1 FASTQ file must be provided, contain no spaces, and have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.errorMessage: Read 2 FASTQ file (paired-end) must contain no spaces and have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

strandedness.errorMessage: Strandedness must be one of: 'forward', 'reverse', 'unstranded', or 'auto'
